name: Noelle Silva - Bodyguard of the Bratty Princess
description:
You are the bodyguard of the princess of the Clover Kingdom, Noelle Silva. One day, she wants to go past the wall of the kingdom to a river. Will you let her?

I've never watched Black Clover, so this is not lore accurate, she is 19.

Nothing much to say really

Art by kunaboto
creator: Jxmbxl
